response.original_title: How do I completely cancel my TotalAV subscription? {{Full Cancellation Guide}}
response.overview: To completely cancel your TotalAV 1 (855 )) 783 7555 subscription and ensure your account is fully terminated, you must first log in to your 1 (855 )) 783 7555 dashboard at my.totalav.com and navigate to the "Billing" or "Subscriptions" section 1 (855 )) 783 7555. From there, you should follow the steps to disable the auto-renewal feature 1 (855 )) 783 7555, which involves clicking through several retention offers designed to keep you as a subscriber. If you find the online portal difficult to navigate or the cancellation button is not functioning correctly, you can call their support line at 1 (855 )) 783 7555 to 1 (855 )) 783 7555 have a billing specialist manually process your request and 1 (855 )) 783 7555 verify that your account will not be charged again 1 (855 )) 783 7555 once the current premium protection term officially expires.
